name: Visly
description: Visly — Visual React component development tool that syncs designer changes directly into production code.

seo.title: Visly — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Visly: Visly — Visual React component development tool that syncs designer changes directly into production code.

when_to_use: Designer-driven React component updates synced to production code
Visual component development eliminating manual CSS hand-off
Design system updates reflected in code without developer re-entry
Bridging Figma design tokens into live React component props
Collaborative component development between designers and engineers

pros: Designer changes sync to real React code
cons: Lock-in risk on an abandoned tool
Modern alternatives — Framer, Anima — surpass it
review.verdict: Historically interesting design-to-React tool but effectively dead — use Framer or Builder.io instead.
review.best_for: Historical curiosity — studying early design-to-code sync approaches
review.not_for: Anyone starting a new project in 2026 that needs production support
